idea-plugin.name: DotEnvify
idea-plugin.description:
Convert raw key-value pairs into properly formatted .env files — directly in your IDE.

Features

  • Parse multiple input formats (KEY=VALUE, KEY VALUE, line pairs, quoted values)
  • Optional export prefix
  • Smart quoting for URLs and values with spaces
  • Alphabetical sorting
  • Filter: ignore lowercase keys, URL-only values
  • Preserve specific keys from existing .env
  • Incremental backups before overwriting
  • Generate .env.example from .env
  • Tool window with live preview
